title: clinopodium woronowii var. woronowii
intro: Clinopodium woronowii var. woronowii is a variety of the Clinopodium woronowii plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium woronowii var. woronowii include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Clinopodium woronowii var. woronowii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
